calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2004 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2004 Continued To Oct-22-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up In Scd
Off Calendar Sep-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Mark Abelson, Esq. for Plaintiff: 100 Bush Corporation.
Plaintiff's witness: Stephen David Seaver, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Elmic Systems USA, Inc. as follows:
Damages $198,768.00
Interest $18,407.48
Attorney's Fees $4,287.50
Costs $388.50
Counsel to prepare Judgment and filed Dismissal as to Defendant: Elmic Systems, Inc., a Delaware Corp.

Sept. 13, 2004
Judgment for a total of $222,505.00 is granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
